assets.alt: Flat liquid-glass participation map showing a few credible employee voices around one LinkedIn signal
assets.notes: Generated PNG blog hero in Sell In Public Flat Liquid Mesh Hero style. The source image was generated at 1672x941, then center-cropped and resized to 1600x700 for the blog hero contract. The article metaphor is a role-based participation map where a few active employee voices surround one buyer-relevant signal and quieter cards sit outside the active group.
assets.final_prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: wide blog hero
Source context from article: This article answers whether every employee should post on LinkedIn. The central idea is that B2B teams should not force universal posting quotas. A stronger program uses a role-based participation model: a few credible employee voices publish original posts, adjacent teammates comment or send posts privately, silent contributors feed raw expertise, and employees without fit can sit out. The article distinguishes employee-generated content from broad employee advocacy and says credibility, role fit, buyer proximity, comfort, and risk should determine participation.

Primary request: Create one simple visual metaphor inferred from the article source context. Use one central flat liquid-glass participation map with a small highlighted group of credible employee voice cards around one buyer-relevant signal, plus a few quieter inactive cards set farther back. Do not default to an exact LinkedIn post card or real LinkedIn UI.

Style reference: Use the Sell In Public Flat Liquid Mesh Hero style: generated raster PNG, softly blended mesh gradient background using one main color plus at most one close complementary color, matte translucent liquid-glass shapes, simple head-on flat UI, consistent white outline weight, clean negative space, and subtle grain.

Composition: Wide landscape hero near 1600x700. Place one central or slightly off-center subject with quiet space around it. Keep the graphic readable as a single concept, not an infographic or screenshot.

Scene/backdrop: Soft turquoise and mint mesh gradient, smoothly blended without hard edges. Avoid multi-color mesh palettes.

Subject: A flat head-on liquid-glass participation map: one central buyer signal card, three bright employee voice cards connected by subtle proximity and spacing, and several muted inactive cards that clearly sit outside the active group. Keep markings abstract and non-readable: short white lines, simple avatar circles, and one generic signal mark only. No readable words.

Detail density: Low. Simple, spacious, and specific. Avoid decorative filler.

Constraints: Generated raster PNG style only. No readable text, logos, watermarks, exact LinkedIn UI, fake metrics, scattered nodes, random lines, icon clouds, fake dashboards full of metrics, overcomplicated UIs, generic LinkedIn-post-card default, glossy 3D objects, glow, bloom, flares, light trails, shiny/specular/reflection cues, bokeh/orbs, hard gradient edges, SVG/vector look, photoreal stock-photo look, more than two background colors, angled perspective, isometric view, tilted panels, or three-quarter UI view.
